languages.text: "Мило... Немедленно выкладывай, что произошло на Янусе и кто направил туда войска".

traits.locale_text: "Мило... Немедленно выкладывай, что произошло на Янусе и кто направил туда войска".

languages.text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."
languages.original_text: "Мило... Немедленно выкладывай, что произошло на Янусе и кто направил туда войска".

traits.locale_text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."
"Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."
"Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."
"Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."

languages.text: «Encantador... Dígame ahora mismo qué ha sucedido en Janus y quién ha enviado tropas allí».
languages.original_text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."

traits.locale_text: «Encantador... Dígame ahora mismo qué ha sucedido en Janus y quién ha enviado tropas allí».

languages.text: “真有意思……立刻告诉我，加努斯发生了什么，是谁往那儿派的兵。”
languages.original_text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."

traits.locale_text: “真有意思……立刻告诉我，加努斯发生了什么，是谁往那儿派的兵。”

languages.text: « Charmant... J'exige de savoir ce qui s'est passé sur Janus et qui a pris l'initiative d'y envoyer des troupes. »
languages.original_text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."

traits.locale_text: « Charmant... J'exige de savoir ce qui s'est passé sur Janus et qui a pris l'initiative d'y envoyer des troupes. »

languages.text: "Muhteşem... Bana derhâl Janus'ta ne olduğunu ve oraya kimin asker gönderdiğini anlatacaksın."
languages.original_text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."

traits.locale_text: "Muhteşem... Bana derhâl Janus'ta ne olduğunu ve oraya kimin asker gönderdiğini anlatacaksın."

languages.text: 「魅力的だ... あなたはすぐに、ジャヌスで何が起こったのか、そして誰が兵士を派遣したのかを私に教えてくれるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."

traits.locale_text: 「魅力的だ... あなたはすぐに、ジャヌスで何が起こったのか、そして誰が兵士を派遣したのかを私に教えてくれるだろう。」

languages.text: "Charmant ... Sagt mir sofort, was auf Janus passiert ist, und wer Truppen dorthin entsandt hat."
languages.original_text: "Charming... You will tell me at once what happened on Janus and who dispatched troops there."

traits.locale_text: "Charmant ... Sagt mir sofort, was auf Janus passiert ist, und wer Truppen dorthin entsandt hat."
